I

IBattleshipController - Interface in battleship.controller
The interface of a controller from the perspective of a view object.
IBattleshipView - Interface in battleship.controller
This interface contains all necessary classes of a view to be usable by the controller.

Returns if the card, on which played belongs to enemy.

Returns if the game over is.
